title: Bethsabée
writer: Pierre Benoît, Jacques Rémy, Roger Vitrac
actors: Danielle Darrieux, Georges Marchal, Jean Murat
plot: Arabella, a beautiful woman with a turbulent past, joins her lover, Captain Dubreuil, in a remote place of Morocco. Another officer, Captain Sommerville, who happens to be her former lover, recognizes her. The colonel, whose daugh...
